mapper.insert:
insert into t_subscription_data
uasl_reservation_id,
subscription_id,
area_info,
uasl_id,
#{uaslReservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{subscriptionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{areaInfo,jdbcType=ARRAY,typeHandler=com.intent_exchange.uasl.handler.myBatis.ArrayTypeHandler},
#{uaslId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
on conflict (uasl_reservation_id) do update set
uasl_reservation_id = EXCLUDED.uasl_reservation_id,
subscription_id = EXCLUDED.subscription_id,
area_info = EXCLUDED.area_info,
uasl_id = EXCLUDED.uasl_id,
mapper.select: WITH expanded_uasl_section_ids AS ( SELECT unnest(uasl_section_ids) AS uasl_section_id FROM t_uasl_reservation ar WHERE ar.uasl_reservation_id = #{uaslReservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ), uasl_section_geometry_collection AS ( SELECT adsg.geometry, adsg.uasl_id FROM v_uasl_design_section_geometry adsg JOIN expanded_uasl_section_ids easi ON adsg.uasl_section_id = easi.uasl_section_id ) SELECT ST_Expand(Box2D(ST_Collect(array_agg(asgc.geometry))), 0.001) AS box2d, replace(array_to_string(array_agg(DISTINCT asgc.uasl_id), ','), '{}', '') AS uasl_id FROM uasl_section_geometry_collection asgc ;
